/.title: Pareto Rail
/.description: Play 60-second rail-shooter levels built by AI models. Rank them blind, then see your own personalized quality vs cost chart.

/levels.title: Pareto Rail — Levels
/levels.description: Browse every rail-shooter level in the benchmark as a playable gallery, each tagged with the model that built it. Start with Crystal Corridor, the hand-built reference level.

/levels/data.title: Pareto Rail — Level data
/levels/data.description: Inspect the full catalog: every published run record for each model-built level, with generation cost and metadata. Built-in reference levels carry no generation data.

/rank.title: Pareto Rail — Rank
/rank.description: Vote in blind matchups: play two anonymous model-built levels back to back and pick the one you prefer. Model names stay hidden until after you cast your vote.

/leaderboard.title: Pareto Rail — Leaderboard
/leaderboard.description: Aggregate benchmark results ranking model-built levels by quality against generation cost. Public results are warming up until the first benchmark release ships.

/about.title: Pareto Rail — About
/about.description: How the Pareto Rail benchmark works: the methodology for one-shot model-built levels, the Crystal Corridor reference, and licensing. Built by @paulbatum, MIT-licensed.

/analysis.title: Pareto Rail — Analysis
/analysis.description: Explore rollout analyses of model level-building runs: the narrative, timeline, file edits, and reconstructed snapshots behind each generated rail-shooter level.
